decision: The platform has a one-time manual setup process to configure the Azure management group hierarchy and billing, Entra ID authentication, and the GitHub organization.
why: BigBang can't bootstrap its own prerequisites — it needs identity to authenticate, a hierarchy to deploy into, and a repo to store configuration.

links.note: App registration created, OIDC federation configured, and role assigned at the management group.
The subscription-bank management group is created here.
The Gazelle-test and Gazelle-prod management groups are created here.
